commonAnnotations.description: Annotations to add to all deployed objects
commonAnnotations.title: commonAnnotations

commonLabels.description: Labels to add to all deployed objects
commonLabels.title: commonLabels

configMapAnnotations.title: configMapAnnotations

configMapLabels.description: Additional labels for the ConfigMap objects. Evaluated as a template

enabled.description: Conditional property used in parent chart
enabled.title: enabled

exampleValue.description: # It is required by CI/CD tools and processes. # @skip exampleValue #
exampleValue.title: exampleValue

extraDeploy.description: Array of extra objects to deploy with the release
extraDeploy.title: extraDeploy

imageCredentials.description: Optional credentials to log in and fetch images from a private registry. These credentials are shared with all the subcharts automatically
imageCredentials.title: imageCredentials

imageCredentialsSecrets.description: Optional list of existing Secrets containing image pull credentials to use for pulling images from private registries. These Secrets are shared with all the subcharts automatically
imageCredentialsSecrets.title: imageCredentialsSecrets

ingress.description: `ingress.*` value takes precedence when set; otherwise the global is used.

annotations.description: Annotations merged into the Ingress. Local `ingress.annotations` wins on key collision. Evaluated as a template
annotations.title: annotations

defaultPathType.description: Default path type applied to ingress rules when `ingress.defaultPathType` is not set. `Prefix` works for nginx, traefik, AWS ALB, and most modern controllers.
defaultPathType.title: defaultPathType

enabled.description: Enable Ingress for this chart. OR'd with the chart's local `ingress.enabled` so setting this once at the parent enables all subchart Ingresses.
enabled.title: enabled

extraLabels.description: Extra labels merged into the Ingress. Local `ingress.extraLabels` wins on key collision. Evaluated as a template
extraLabels.title: extraLabels

ingressClassName.description: Default ingress class name applied when `ingress.ingressClassName` is not set
ingressClassName.title: ingressClassName

path.description: Default path applied to ingress rules when `ingress.path` is not set. AWS ALB users should override to `/*`.
path.title: path

tls.description: TLS entries concatenated with the local `ingress.tls`. Evaluated as a template
tls.title: tls

ingress.title: ingress

platformServiceAddress.description: Seqera Platform Service name: can be the internal Kubernetes hostname or an external ingress hostname. Evaluated as a template. Required when deploying this subchart standalone. When deploying as part of the parent `platform` umbrella chart, this value is inherited from the parent chart's `global` section
platformServiceAddress.title: platformServiceAddress

platformServicePort.description: Seqera Platform Service port. Required when deploying this subchart standalone. When deploying as part of the parent `platform` umbrella chart, this value is inherited from the parent chart's `global` section
platformServicePort.title: platformServicePort

studiosConnectionUrl.description: Base URL for Studios connections: can be any value, since each session will use a unique subdomain under `.global.studiosDomain` anyway to connect. Evaluated as a template
studiosConnectionUrl.title: studiosConnectionUrl

studiosDomain.description: Domain where the Studios service listens. Make sure the TLS certificate covers this and its wildcard subdomains. Evaluated as a template
studiosDomain.title: studiosDomain

annotations.description: Ingress annotations specific to your load balancer. Evaluated as a template
annotations.title: annotations

defaultBackend.description: Configure the default service for the ingress (evaluated as template) Important: make sure only one defaultBackend is defined across the k8s cluster: if the ingress doesn't reconcile successfully, 'describe ingress <name>' will report problems
defaultBackend.title: defaultBackend

defaultPathType.description: Default path type for the Ingress. When empty, falls back to `global.ingress.defaultPathType`
defaultPathType.title: defaultPathType

extraHosts.description: Additional hosts you want to include. Evaluated as a template
extraHosts.title: extraHosts

extraLabels.description: Additional labels for the ingress object. Evaluated as a template
extraLabels.title: extraLabels

ingressClassName.description: Name of the ingress class (replaces the deprecated annotation `kubernetes.io/ingress.class`). When empty, falls back to `global.ingress.ingressClassName`
ingressClassName.title: ingressClassName

path.description: Path for the main ingress rule. When empty, falls back to `global.ingress.path`
path.title: path

tls.description: TLS configuration. Evaluated as a template
tls.title: tls

enabled.description: Enable init containers that coordinate startup dependencies (for example, wait for Seqera Platform readiness before starting, etc)
enabled.title: enabled

extraEnvVars.title: extraEnvVars

readOnlyRootFilesystem.title: readOnlyRootFilesystem

pullSecrets.title: pullSecrets

initContainers.description: Additional init containers for the proxy pod. Evaluated as a template
initContainers.title: initContainers

localCacheTTL.description: TTL for local cache of Redis keys used for resiliency against Redis failures
localCacheTTL.title: localCacheTTL

oidcClientRegistrationToken.description: Initial access token to share with Seqera Platform to restrict registration requests to only authorized OIDC clients. The token can be provided as a string of random chars or as an external k8s Secret: in the latter case, a key can also be provided. If neither a string nor a Secret is provided, the chart will generate a random token WARNING: Always explicitly set this value or use an existing secret when using Kustomize. Auto-generated random values are incompatible with Kustomize. When upgrading releases via Kustomize, Helm cannot query the cluster to check if a secret already exists, causing it to regenerate a new random value on each upgrade
oidcClientRegistrationToken.title: oidcClientRegistrationToken

oidcClientRegistrationTokenSecretKey.description: Key in the existing Secret containing the OIDC client registration token
oidcClientRegistrationTokenSecretKey.title: oidcClientRegistrationTokenSecretKey

oidcClientRegistrationTokenSecretName.description: Name of an existing Secret containing the OIDC client registration token as an alternative to the oidcClientRegistrationToken field. Note: the Secret must already exist in the same namespace at the time of deployment
oidcClientRegistrationTokenSecretName.title: oidcClientRegistrationTokenSecretName
